THE BRIEF
The Partner Program is an amazing opportunity for you to help
out your network, as well as get financially compensated for it.
Many of the people in your network are either business owners or
part of flourishing businesses. They are scratching their head as to
how to go about their online marketing. They’re losing SO much
money by not marketing themselves correctly.
I don’t blame them, they should be focusing on the structural
integrity of their business and how to grow it.
78% of Small businesses now get
at least one quarter of
new customers via social media
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

WHO WE ARe
You could be the person to help them out.
IAG Media is a marketing agency run by millennials who simply
understand the social landscape like no one else.
We have deep roots in content creation and brand work.
We offer a premium service at a price point no other agency
can match. Hopefully you’ve seen some of our work, some of
the companies we work with:
(Bang & Olufsen, Aflete, ZebraFuel, etc.) and truly believe that
we’re trying to set straight an industry that is so hazy and con-
fused.

HOW IT WORKs

y
ou c ould m ake t h at over a p h one c all, or a t ext, even a lunch.
If you refer a client to us for one of our monthly retainers and they
sign on, then you get 30% of the first month’s retainer. For
example, if a client signs on to a £3,000 a month
retainer - you will be sent £1,000 (approx.)
If you refer a client to us for consulting or content creation as a
one of project, you will receive TWENTY percent of the ENTIRE
project. For example, a two day video shoot costing £2,000,
£400 will go straight to you.
YOU	IAG MEDIA

-- 4 of 6 --

HOW You Can START
To make things even better, you don’t have to pitch ANYTHING
to them if you don’t want to. In fact, you can even give them free
value. We believe that a solid partnership should be based off of
respect and trust. We’re not in the business of taking. We offer a
social media audit, where we go through a company’s online pres-
ence (including website) and send them back a detailed analysis
of what they’re doing right, what they’re doing wrong and how
they could be leaving money on the table.
We offer this for £297, but to help you - we have created a page
on the website where you can send them to and they can get this
FOR FREE. Here is the link:
http://iag-media.com/audit/
Now you’re not even pitching them anything, you’re just offer-
ing them pure value and in return, if they come on board with us,
you’ll be compensated generously.
All you have to do is, once you’ve sent them to the audit page,
just email iman@iag-media.com or bob@iag-media.com with
the details of who you referred and then we’ll know you’re the
ones who sent them for the free audit!
Now you’re not even pitching them anything, you’re just offer-
